title: Lumpwood Charcoal 10kg by Big K Products
features: Ready to cook within 30 minutes, with up to 90 minute cooking time
description: From the manufacturer Big K Lumpwood Charcoal 10kg This lump wood charcoal is ideal for when you need a quality charcoal for use at home or if you are lighting a BBQ that isn't going to be running the entire day. The charcoal will produce a wonderful, deep smokey flavour that will penetrate your food and give it that authentic grilled taste. Dimensions 640(H) x 310(W) x 130(D)mm Weight 10kg Made from high quality charcoal fines Uniformly shaped pieces Easy to light High heat output Flat bottomed bags for easy display Comprehensive safety & usage instructions included
